en.text: a primitive root; properly, to snatch away, i.e. terminate; but used only as denominative from H5592 (in the sense of a vestibule), to wait at the threshold

senses.gloss_en: a primitive root; properly, to snatch away, i.e. terminate; but used only as denominative from H5592 (in the sense of a vestibule), to wait at the threshold
